title: Peppery Velvety Norwegian Cod Salad
description: A refreshing, protein-packed cod salad with a creamy avocado base, peppery dressing, and a velvety texture perfect for post-workout nourishment.

ingredients.name: Norwegian cod fillet, skinless
ingredients.notes: seasoned with salt and pepper before steaming

instructions: Preheat a steamer or bring a pot of water to a gentle boil.
Season the cod fillet with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Steam the cod for 4–5 minutes, until it flakes easily with a fork.
Remove the cod from the steamer and allow it to cool slightly, then flake into bite-sized pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the diced avocado, cucumber, red onion, chopped dill, and toasted sunflower seeds.
Add the flaked cod to the bowl and gently toss to mix.
In a small jar, whisk together the olive oil, apple cider vinegar, lemon juice, sea salt, and black pepper until emulsified.
Drizzle the vinaigrette over the salad and toss carefully to coat everything evenly.
Garnish with additional chopped dill or a sprinkle of sunflower seeds if desired.
Serve immediately at room temperature or slightly chilled for a refreshing post‑workout meal.
